summary: Comprehensive backend + light frontend testing of DEVAM Real Estate CRM. 16/16 pytest backend tests PASS including auth, dashboard, leads CRUD w/ AI scoring, builders, projects, site visits, bookings (lead stage flips to Booked), and inventory (verified 80 units in Shilp Aaria). Frontend landing, login, dashboard, all 6 sidebar navs, and Leads page (8 rescore buttons + 8 stage selectors) verified end-to-end with admin@devam.com / Admin@123.

issues: Default selected project in dropdown is the most recently created (Sangath Sentosa Villas) which has 0 inventory units, so the page shows 'No inventory units found' on first load. Better UX would be to default to a project that actually has inventory (Shilp Aaria has 80 units). Minor.

action_items: Optional UX: On /app/inventory, default the project dropdown to the first project that has inventory units (or merge counts across all projects).
critical_code_review_comments: score_lead_with_ai imports emergentintegrations inside the function — fine for lazy load, but consider importing at top-level so failures surface during boot.
Cookies set with samesite='none' + secure=True correctly support cross-origin preview; bearer token fallback in JSON response is also implemented — good.

CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True which most browsers will reject for cookie-auth cross-origin. Bearer auth works around it; consider switching to explicit origins from CORS_ORIGINS env for production.
PATCH /site-visits/{vid} and /inventory/{uid} accept a raw dict instead of a Pydantic model — no validation on field names/types. Low priority but worth tightening.
Seed function correctly idempotent (skips when builders > 0) and re-aligns admin password if .env value changed — matches playbook expectations.
MongoDB _id is excluded from all read responses via projection — good.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook recommends throttling after 5 fails). Not present; out of scope for MVP but noted.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 4 builders, 4 projects, 80 inventory units (Shilp Aaria), 8 leads, 3 site visits, 1 booking. All verified present via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix. Bearer auth works; cookie auth also works in same-session requests. AI scoring (Claude via emergentintegrations) succeeds quickly (~1-3s) and returns valid 0-100 score + Hot/Warm/Cold category + reason. Booking creation correctly flips lead.stage to 'Booked'. Inventory list with ?project_id={shilp_aaria_id} returns exactly 80 docs. All 16 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_devam_crm.py pass. Frontend data-testids confirmed: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, nav-leads/projects/builders/site-visits/bookings/inventory, lead-rescore-*, lead-stage-select-*.
